title: lmmunostaining of Organoid Sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"35gkc","text":"lmmunostaining of Organoid Sections derived from human iPS cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"41k6t","text":"-\tBlocking Buffer: lxPBS + 5% FBS + 1% BSA+ 0.3% Triton X + 0.1% Azide","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f896q","text":"-\tlx PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2dpu7","text":"-\t24-well plate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a39ke","text":"-\tPaint brush","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3q8ah","text":"-\tIncubation Buffer: lxPBS + 1% Triton X","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"i6td","text":"-\tPrimary and secondary antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3l6qv","text":"-\tFluoromount with DAPI","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place organoid sections into 1ml of PBS in a 24-well plate (1 section per well)
Add ~600ul of blocking buffer for 20mins at RT on the rocker
Wash 3x with 500ul of PBS and aspirate off PBS
Add primary AB at working concentration and incubate in Blocking Buffer overnight at 4°C (GFAP-1:500)
Wash 3x with 500ul of PBST, and aspirate it off

Add secondary AB at working concentration and incubate in Blocking Buffer at RT on a rocker for 1 hour, making sure to cover the plate with aluminum foil to prevent bleaching of the secondary AB (1:1000 for both secondaries)
Wash 3x in PBST mount onto a slide in water
DAPI staining is 2ug/ml in PBST for 15 min at RT
Once the section is on the slide, aspirate off some of the water and add a drop of Fluoromount with DAPI before placing round coverslip on top, being careful not to cause any bubbles underneath
leave overnight at RT to let dry and covered to prevent bleaching
creator: Kevin Wojta
